calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-21-2024 Off Calendar

Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs And Enhancement Payments
Off Calendar Mar-06-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. SYDNEY CASTILLO-JOHNSON, Esq. of JCL Law Firm (Tel: 619-599-8292) and Atty. MELISSA RAE ROBINSON, Esq. of H.B.K. Lawyers, APC (tel: 818-696-2306) for Plaintiffs.
Atty. PHILIP PERSON, Esq. of Greenberg Traurig, LLP (tel: 415-655-1300) for Defendant.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF BRITTANI POWELL, MELANIE MCCONNAUGHY, ROSCOE SIMPSON Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs And Enhancement Payments.

Matter discussed. The Court inquires Counsel as to whether a compliance hearing is necessary. Counsel Castillo-Johnson states a compliance hearing is not necessary. Upon conclusion of discussion, the Court grants Plaintiffs' motion for attorneys fees and costs and enhancement payments.

Order signed. Judgment signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

FINAL APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION AND PAGA SETTLEMENT
Off Calendar Mar-06-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. SYDNEY CASTILLO-JOHNSON, Esq. of JCL Law Firm (Tel: 619-599-8292) and Atty. MELISSA RAE ROBINSON, Esq. of H.B.K. Lawyers, APC (tel: 818-696-2306) for Plaintiffs.
Atty. PHILIP PERSON, Esq. of Greenberg Traurig, LLP (tel: 415-655-1300) for Defendant.

Hearing Re: FINAL APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION AND PAGA SETTLEMENT.

Matter discussed. The Court inquires Counsel as to whether a compliance hearing is necessary. Counsel Castillo-Johnson states a compliance hearing is not necessary. Upon conclusion of discussion, the Court grants the motion for final approval of class action and PAGA settlement.

Order signed. Judgment signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

Atty. SYDNEY CASTILLO-JOHNSON, Esq. of JCL Law Firm (Tel: 619-599-8292) and Atty. MELISSA RAE ROBINSON, Esq. of H.B.K. Lawyers, APC (tel: 818-696-2306) for Plaintiffs.
Atty. PHILIP PERSON, Esq. of Greenberg Traurig, LLP (tel: 415-655-1300) for Defendant.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF BRITTANI POWELL, MELANIE MCCONNAUGHY, ROSCOE SIMPSON's Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action And Paga Settlement.

Matter discussed. The Court inquires Counsel as to whether a compliance hearing is necessary. Counsel Castillo-Johnson states a compliance hearing is not necessary. Upon conclusion of discussion, the Court grants the motion for final approval of class action and PAGA settlement.

Order signed. Judgment signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
